#8JUDGE BAKER, M BRADY, CSR, A SAUSA, CLERK C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DAVID MCCLURE AND MIYE GOISHI SUPERVISING ATTORNEY APPEARING THE PLAINTIFF AND VINCENT O'BRIEN APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT. WITNESSES SWORNED AND EXAMINED. MATTER CONTINUED 11/22/94 AT 10:30AM.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT SILBERMAN,CARY IND&DBA LAW OFFIC OF CARY SILBERMAN

#8JUDGE BAKER, JR, M BRADY, CSR, A SAUSA, CLERK C/C FOR CONT'D TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT AS BEFORE WITNESSES PREVIOUSLY SWORNED RECALLED IN THE WITNESS STAND. CASE SETTLED PER STIPULATION. TERMS AND CONDITIONS STATED ON RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILBERMAN,CARY IND&DBA LAW OFFIC OF CARY SILBERMAN $21,783.15 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,783.15
